name: Pecan Toffee Squares
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Moist Supreme Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, butter, and egg. Mix well with a pastry blender or fork.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of the greased pan.
4. Bake for 7 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, vanilla extract, and an egg. Mix well.
6. Stir in the toffee bits and chopped pecans.
7. Remove the pan from the oven and pour the filling evenly over the warm base.
8. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 22 to 30 minutes or until the filling is set.
9. Allow the bars to cool completely for at least 1 hour before cutting into squares.
10. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 36 bars.
